configurations.name: proxy: debug (port 8317)
configurations.detail: Debug proxy server under dlv dap with LOG_LEVEL=debug — breakpoints live across handlers/, svc/, model/. Long-running daemon: do NOT use stopOnEntry; F5 to start, breakpoints hot before next request.
